hook: These baby proofing products saved my sanity.
transcript: These baby proofing products saved my sanity. As you can see, kids do not realize that big pieces of furniture can fall over and smash them. Personally, I will not take the chance. I love these damage-free anchors. They're really easy to install. Some furniture like this vanity, also the mirror in our bedroom, is pretty tricky, so I love these adhesive ones that attach to anything. I cannot even tell you how many times this has already come in handy. We have been using these no-show cabinet locks for the past three years on basically all of the cabinets in our house. We actually use this cord hider not only aesthetically, but as a safety precaution because both my kids have tried to rip down their baby monitors using the cord and even chewed on it. We've got a lot of stairs in our home, and even a crawling baby can move faster than you think. Gates are a must. And last but not least are these adhesive locks. We use them on so many different things, closets, drawers, garbage, everything.
